145.reason: [Error: Should check p->adj != x instead of v != x, because v is the dequeued vertex (which may be x) and we want to print the neighbor p->adj only if it is not the deleted vertex]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should check p->adj != x instead of v != x, because v is the dequeued vertex (which may be x) and we want to print the neighbor p->adj only if it is not the deleted vertex]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should check p->adj != x instead of v != x, because v is the current vertex being processed, not the neighbor. The condition should be if(p->adj != x) to skip the deleted vertex when printing the neighbor.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Should check p->adj != x instead of v!=x
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.07692307692307693 , reason:  Checks the dequeued vertex v instead of the neighbor p->adj. Should be if(p->adj != x)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly checks the dequeued vertex v instead of the neighbor p->adj. Should be if(p->adj != x).

37.reason: Reads number of edges but this should be edge count; also overwrites global n which is used as vertex count elsewhere

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Reads number of edges but this should be edge count; also overwrites global n which is used as vertex count elsewhere
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.07692307692307693 , reason:  Input format is "n m", but only reads n here. Should read both in main, and loop should iterate m times.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  Reads only the second input value (m) into n. The input format provides n and m on the first line, which should be read together.

38.reason: Loop runs for number of edges, but n is now edge count; however vertex count is not stored

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Loop runs for number of edges, but n is now edge count; however vertex count is not stored
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.07692307692307693 , reason:  Should iterate m times (number of edges), not n times (number of vertices)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  Should loop m times to read m edges, not n times.
